title: GeBBS Healthcare Solutions - RCM & Patient Contact Solutions
problem: Healthcare providers face high denial rates, eligibility-related denials, inconsistent prior authorization tracking, and inefficient patient contact processes.
solution: Technology-enabled RCM services with AI-enabled iCode platform. Patient contact solutions for eligibility verification, authorization tracking, POS collections. Extended business office services for claims and AR management.
technology: iCode AI platform, RPA, business process automation, ML
target_customer: Healthcare providers, radiology groups, health systems
ai_type: AI, ML, NLP for coding and RCM
traction_signals: Everest Group RCM PEAK Matrix Leader 2023
regulatory_notes: HIPAA compliant, risk adjustment coding expertise
varden_fit: HIGH — GeBBS proves offshore + AI model works for RCM. European healthcare could use similar services for multi-payer eligibility and claims.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Offshore RCM with AI augmentation is a proven model. European payers and providers need similar services.
